reasoning: Experience: 15+ years in software engineering (matches minimum experience requirement).
Education: Bachelor's in Computer Science (meets minimum degree requirement; no advanced AI degree noted).

AI/Cloud Focus: Current role at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP code generators), showing direct AI/cloud experience. Previous roles included low-latency apps, Kubernetes deployments, and geo-data platforms (indirectly relevant).

Leadership/Innovation: Founded GISCollective (open-source, event-driven platform), demonstrating entrepreneurial experience. Multiple talks/workshops and mentorship (e.g., Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos) suggest thought leadership.
Technical Fluency: Proficient in TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, Kubernetes, MongoDB, AWS CDK (strong polyglot and modern stack expertise).
Gaps: No explicit mention of AI/ML products or platforms built from scratch. No PhD/Master's in AI. Limited evidence of advising strategic customers/partners on AI technologies.
strengths: 15+ years of diverse software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded systems, and cloud infrastructure.
Direct AI-related experience in current role (AI-agent infrastructure, MCP frameworks) and entrepreneurial background (GISCollective).
Strong technical fluency in modern stacks (TypeScript, Node.js, Kubernetes, AWS) and polyglot programming (DLang, C++, Java).
concerns: No advanced AI degree (Master's/PhD) or clear evidence of AI product/platform leadership.
Limited explicit mention of advising strategic customers/partners on AI/cloud technologies.
Current AI experience is infrastructure-focused (agent workflows) rather than AI-powered product development.
response.justification: Aisha’s résumé demonstrates strong technical depth, AI/agent infrastructure experience, and entrepreneurial leadership, meeting most requirements. However, the lack of an advanced AI degree and limited evidence of advising strategic customers on AI technologies slightly reduces alignment. The high experience level and innovation focus balance these gaps.
